claim_metrics.note: Highest payer among general insurers; IBAI 2023-24 General Insurance Claim Insights ranks NIA #1 on settlement

trustpilot.note: New India Assurance (PSU) does not have an established Trustpilot review profile. Indian PSU general insurers concentrate review activity on government portals and Policybazaar.

notable_themes: PSU insurer with India's largest GWP (Rs 43,618 cr in FY25)
Highest claim payout among general insurers (paying more than premiums collected, ICR 103%)
Customer service / digital experience consistently rated below private peers
Strong cashless network for legacy users; preferred by older customers
Premium hike of 10% effective Nov 2024 was widely discussed
FY 2024-25 CSR climbed to 98.38% by count - sector-leading
